steps.title: Identify the instructional need
steps.content: When introducing an unfamiliar concept, provide a clear definition first. The notes define biographical analysis as an approach that “considers the personal experiences of the artist.”

steps.title: Match definition to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A provides exactly this definition: biographical analysis is “an approach to art criticism” that “considers the personal experiences of the artist.” Choice
  • B focuses on stylistic analysis instead
  • C only contrasts the two approaches without defining biographical analysis
  • D offers only an example
.

Effective instruction of an unfamiliar concept requires definition before examples.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
